activities_projects.title: List of Main Characters
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the prose
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the main characters mentioned in the story
Write one sentence describing each character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies characters and understands their basic roles
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct listing with brief description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Horace Danby
activities_projects.objective: Understand the personality of Horace Danby
steps: Read the paragraphs describing Horace Danby
Write 4–5 sentences about his habits and nature
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands character traits of the protagonist

activities_projects.title: Horace Danby’s Hobby
activities_projects.objective: Identify Horace Danby’s interest and motivation
steps: Find what Horace likes to collect
Write 3 sentences explaining why he steals every year

activities_projects.title: Setting of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand where the story takes place
steps: Identify the main place mentioned in the story
Write 3–4 lines describing the setting

activities_projects.title: Role of the Young Lady
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the young lady in the story
steps: Read the conversation between Horace and the young lady
Write three points describing her behaviour
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies key role in the plot

activities_projects.title: Reason for Horace’s Arrest
activities_projects.objective: Understand the cause of Horace Danby’s downfall
steps: Recall the ending of the story
Write 3–4 sentences explaining why Horace was arrested

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Identify four important events in the story
Arrange them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
steps: Select five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings and frame one sentence for each

activities_projects.title: Theme of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the central idea of the prose
steps: Think about the message conveyed by the story
Write the theme in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the theme of the lesson

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
steps: Reflect on the ending of the story
Write the moral in your own words
